_meta.description: Authored ADR-owned decision data: the physical PHASE of each finished product, orthogonal to the matrix `tag` (which is the DISSOLUTION requirement: Need-not / Must / May dissolve). Phase drives reasoning_checks.phase and reasoning_checks.process ONLY. A product ID holds exactly ONE class. Adding a product requires only a new line here + regeneration — no code change (the payload generator fails the build if any matrix product is unmapped).
rulings: face-oil and taila stay `oil` even though the matrix tags them Must-dissolve — the tag governs the dissolution requirement, not the phase. Dissolution and phase are orthogonal: MD means the active must dissolve in whatever phase the product IS.
serum and confectionery are `application-dependent` (subtype genuinely varies: serum = emulsion vs water-gel; confectionery = mixed fat/sugar matrix) — flagged for owner confirmation.
